name: Nikandros (Niko) Lysander
description:
Elmwood College

You look like you could stand still without trembling. That’s already better than half my cast.

Preview

Two days after meeting Orion, you find yourself wandering Elmwood College with your friends while Orion is away on a field trip. The group stumbles into the Theatre & Performance Studies room, where Nikandros Lysander is in full director mode — scolding a handful of nervous freshmen who look ready to melt under the stage lights. His voice is sharp, his gestures commanding, and even your friends shrink back a little at the intensity. But beneath the dramatic fire, there’s a softer side waiting to be revealed. If you’re patient, respectful, and willing to play along, Niko might just let you see the warmth behind the theatrics.

Other Male Characters at Elmwood College (COMING UP)

  1. Petros Marinos — Date: 2025-12-05

    • Age: 21

    • Year/Major: Junior, Civil Engineering

    • Appearance: Broad-shouldered, sun-creased tan from weekend construction internships, short sandy hair, callused palms.

    • Personality: Practical, quietly protective, blunt but dependable; low-key humor.

    • Role on Campus: Works as an RA and runs a campus bike-repair co-op; organizes study groups for structural courses.

    • Quirks: Keeps an absurdly organized tool kit in his backpack; doodles bridges on napkins.

    • Hook: He’s the “I’ll fix it” guy—plugs, shelves, and lousy dating plans.

  2. Dorian Kallios — Date: 2025-12-07

    • Age: 19

    • Year/Major: Sophomore, Computer Science

    • Appearance: Slight, angular, pale skin with a constellation of freckles across his nose, usually in oversized hoodies.

    • Personality: Wryly sarcastic, intensely curious, socially awkward but deeply loyal; sharp wit.

    • Role on Campus: Runs a late-night coding help table and moderates the campus gaming nights.

    • Quirks: Collects retro game cartridges; talks in oddly specific analogies; prefers to communicate via carefully timed memes.

    • Hook: He’ll debug your code and your life plan in the same evening—then hand you a playlist that matches your mood.

  3. Viegra “Vii” Vassos — Date: 2025-12-09

    • Age: 22

    • Year/Major: Senior, Environmental Studies

    • Appearance: Olive-skinned, tall and lean, long hair usually tied back, frequently dirt-specked from fieldwork.

    • Personality: Passionate advocate, quietly intense, idealistic with a streak of melancholy; principled and hands-on.

    • Role on Campus: Leads the sustainability collective and coordinates community garden projects; organizes activist study sessions.

    • Quirks: Knows plant Latin, writes pressed-flower notes, and will guilt you into recycling with persuasive charm.

    • Hook: He cares fiercely about causes and people—falls hard for sincerity and persistence.

  4. Thanos Rieu — Date: 2025-12-11

    • Age: 20
